Well this is where things complicate a little bit this is like the schematic diagram of the neural network if we like zoom in into the toy diagram of this neural net this is what we call the Transformer neural network architecture and. This is like a diagram of it now what's remarkable about these neural nuts is we actually understand in full detail the architecture we know exactly what mathematical operations happen at all the different stages of it.
the problem is that these 100 billion parameters are dispersed throughout the entire neural network work and so. Basically these buildon parameters of billions of parameters are throughout the neural nut and all we know is how to adjust these parameters iteratively to make the network as a whole better at the next word prediction task. So we know how to optimize these parameters we know how to adjust them over time to get a better next word prediction.
